entries.title: cash-drugs uses slug-based routing with query params
entries.body: Upstream API at /api/cache/{slug}. Key slugs: fda-ndc-by-name (BRAND_NAME), drugnames, drugclasses, spls-by-name (DRUGNAME), spls-by-class (DRUG_CLASS). Flat array response shape (data: [...] not data.results).

entries.title: Chi chosen for middleware-heavy gateway architecture
entries.body: Chi v5 over net/http stdlib — middleware chaining purpose-built for auth, rate limiting, NDC validation, logging, CORS, metrics, request ID. Uses stdlib interfaces.

entries.title: Interface-based mocking enables comprehensive handler testing
entries.body: DrugClient, SPLClient, RxNormClient interfaces with mock implementations allow testing all handler paths without Redis or upstream. Pattern reused across all milestones.

entries.title: M1 NDC Lookup complete: 42 tests, 97.1% coverage
entries.body: ACs covered: 17. RED: 32 tests. GREEN: all passing. Blockers: gitignore and Go version mismatch caused 3 fix commits. Spec quality: good.

entries.title: M2 Security & Rate Limiting: 20 ACs, Redis integration tests behind build tag
entries.body: All gates pass. Coverage 65.3% total but non-Redis code >80%. Redis implementations at 0% because integration tests use //go:build integration tag. Fixed auth_test.go grace period bug.

entries.title: M3 Extended Lookups: lazy Redis caching with sliding TTL
entries.body: 4 endpoints (names, classes, class lookup, drugs-by-class). Lazy cache with 60-min sliding TTL using GetEx. ~104K drug names, ~1.2K classes cached. Pagination helper reused across all list endpoints.

entries.title: M4 RxNorm: upstream response shape alignment required live testing
entries.body: RxNorm client needed 2 fix commits to align with actual cash-drugs response shapes. Mock-based unit tests passed but E2E revealed field name mismatches. Always validate against live upstream.

entries.title: M6 SPL Interactions: regex XML parsing sufficient for Section 7
entries.body: SPL XML has namespace issues making full XML parser complex. Regex extraction of Section 7 (Drug Interactions) works reliably. spls-by-class deferred (unreliable/timeouts). Cross-reference uses word-boundary regex matching.

entries.title: Beta promotion: 10/10 evidence score at alpha→beta
entries.body: All evidence items present: specs, 80%+ coverage, CI/CD, PR workflow, 2+ environments, conventional commits, TDD evidence, branch protection, release tags, quality gates.

entries.title: M7 Operational Hardening: 4 features, 29 tests, TDD clean
entries.body: Request ID middleware (8 tests), autocomplete (13 tests), Redis persistence (ops docs), Prometheus alerts (8 tests). All TDD RED→GREEN confirmed. Coverage maintained at 80.7%.

entries.title: k6 baseline comparison enables performance regression gates
entries.body: k6 harness covers all 21 endpoints across 4 scenarios (smoke/load/spike/soak). Baselines stored as JSON, comparison tool exits non-zero on >15% regression. Integrated into Makefile.

entries.title: Retro finding: learning checkpoints missed for 6 milestones
entries.body: M3 through M7 had no learning checkpoints recorded. Root cause: agent did not self-checkpoint after verify/cycle/deploy triggers. Documentation discipline must be enforced alongside code quality.

entries.title: Human directive: documentation is as important as code
entries.body: Specs must be updated to Complete when done. All learning checkpoints must be written. Documentation is a first-class deliverable, not an afterthought. This is the #1 improvement priority.

entries.title: M8 CacheAside[T]: 211 lines eliminated across 11 methods
entries.body: Generic CacheAside[T] replaced per-method cache boilerplate in DrugDataService (3), RxNormService (5), SPLService (3). Service files 865→654 lines. Pointer-vs-value return needed care: not-found sentinel via zero-value check (RxCUI=="" for profile). 9 unit tests for the generic.

entries.title: M8 Expanded SPL sections: regex parser extended for sections 4-6
entries.body: Same regex approach as Section 7 applied to sections 4 (Contraindications), 5 (Warnings), 6 (Adverse Reactions). SPLDetail model gains 3 new fields. Reuses InteractionSection type. ParseInteractions preserved for backward compat.

entries.title: Cycle 4 complete: M8 CacheAside[T] + SPL sections 4-6
entries.body: Duration: 1 day. Features: 2 advanced SHAPED→VERIFIED. CacheAside[T] eliminated 211 lines across 11 methods. SPL sections 4-6 added with 6 parser tests. Coverage 81.1%. Pointer-vs-value generics required not-found sentinel pattern. TTL per environment deferred — only open M8 criterion. Documentation discipline improved: checkpoints L-014/L-015 written during cycle, specs updated.

entries.title: Cycle 6+7 complete: M8.5 Bugathon Tier 1+2 (13 bugs fixed)
entries.body: Duration: 1 day. Tier 1: 7 security/correctness fixes (admin auth, SPL pagination, error matching, null fields, body limit, CORS wildcard, indexer TTL). Tier 2: 6 DX/reliability fixes (error codes, whitespace, RxNorm 200, rate limit header, metrics key truncation, health deps). DX-4 marked not-a-bug. Coverage 81.0%. Staging API keys updated for CORS change. 3-agent swarm audit was highly effective for bug discovery.

entries.title: 3-agent bug-finding swarm found critical admin auth vulnerability
entries.body: spawn-swarm with QA/Principal/Support roles found 35 bugs including a critical auth bypass (empty ADMIN_SECRET). Only the code-review agent caught it — live testing didn't expose it. Multi-perspective swarm audits should be standard before any public launch.

entries.title: M9 Circuit breaker: io.NopCloser breaks HTTP connection reuse
entries.body: Wrapping resp.Body with io.NopCloser(io.LimitReader(...)) prevents the original Close() from releasing the connection back to the pool. Must use a custom limitedReadCloser that preserves the original Closer. Also, drugnames endpoint returns 7.4MB — initial 5MB limit truncated the response causing silent JSON decode failures (502). Always check actual upstream response sizes before setting limits.

entries.title: Cycle 8 complete: M9 circuit breaker + stale-cache + parallel interactions
entries.body: Duration: 1 session. Circuit breaker (9 tests), stale-cache with dual-key strategy (3 tests), parallel interactions with semaphore(5), MaxBytesReader (10MB). Two production bugs found post-merge: NopCloser connection leak and 5MB limit too low. Both fixed same session. Coverage 81.1%.

entries.title: Autocomplete optimization: in-memory index gives 119,730x speedup
entries.body: Replaced per-request 7.4MB JSON deserialize + O(n) linear scan with pre-sorted in-memory index + O(log n) binary search. 30ms→0.25μs, 29MB→1KB, 200K→5 allocs. Key insight: the bottleneck was JSON deserialization from Redis on every request, not the prefix matching itself. Pre-lowercasing entries during index build eliminates repeated ToLower calls during search. Index refreshes on CacheTTL interval.
